name: Marshaven
description: A sprawling trade town built on stilts above the Blackmoor Marshes, where smugglers, merchants, and fugitives mingle in a lawless bazaar that the Iron Guard tolerates only because it serves as an invaluable intelligence hub. If it can be bought, sold, or fenced, Marshaven is the place.

properties.government: Merchant consortium with no official crown allegiance
properties.defenses: Retractable boardwalks, marsh gas traps, and mercenary companies
properties.notableFeature: The Floating Market — a bazaar on interconnected barges
